overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy riding a horse through a foggy prairie landscape. The journey passes rocky outcrops, telegraph poles lining the path, and includes a brief encounter with another rider before approaching a distant tree line.

agents.ego_description: riding horse at a steady canter along the dirt path through golden prairie grass

entered.detail: large gray boulder formation lining the left side of the path
low green and brown bushes dotting the grassland
single large tree visible in the distance on the left

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a cowboy riding through a foggy prairie. Large rock formations line the left side of the dirt path while scattered bushes dot the golden grassland, and a prominent tree stands in the distance.

events.description: wooden telegraph poles appear lining both sides of the dirt path

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride horse at steady pace through the pole-lined corridor

entered.detail: wooden telegraph pole with crossbars and wires
matching wooden telegraph pole on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The rider enters a stretch of prairie lined with wooden telegraph poles on both sides of the path. The large rock formations and prominent tree from the previous section fall behind as the character continues through the misty landscape between the rows of poles.

events.description: another horse rider approaches from the opposite direction and passes by on the left

agents.ego_description: riding steadily through open prairie as another horseman approaches

notable_agents.action: riding horse toward camera at a gallop, passing on the left side of the path

entered.detail: wooden directional signpost with multiple arms
small trees appearing in the distance on the right

segments.scene_description: The telegraph poles disappear as the rider crosses open prairie. Another horseman approaches from the distance and passes by on the left. A wooden signpost becomes visible on the left side of the path as scattered trees appear on the horizon.

agents.ego_description: riding toward increasingly wooded area with denser tree coverage

entered.detail: medium-sized oak trees scattered across the grassland
matching oak trees on the right side of the path
dense forest tree line visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the rider approaching a denser area with scattered oak trees on both sides and a visible tree line in the distance. The wooden signpost is left behind as the path continues through taller grass toward the forested horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy prairie that transitions from a rocky landscape into a wooded horizon. It begins by following a cowboy riding past large rock formations and scattered bushes under a misty sky, with a single prominent tree visible in the distance. As the rider progresses, the rocky terrain gives way to a stretch of path lined with wooden telegraph poles on both sides. The scene then opens into a wide expanse of prairie where another horseman passes by on the left, leading the camera toward a wooden signpost and a horizon dotted with emerging trees. Finally, the path shifts into a denser area of oak trees and taller grass as the rider approaches a distant, forested tree line.
